ddls:
CREATE TABLE "community_resilience" (
  "resilience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "rural" INTEGER /* Indicator if the community is rural */,
  "home_ownership" INTEGER /* Indicator if the individual owns a home */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Level of education */,
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the education levels table */,
  "male" INTEGER /* Indicator if the individual is male */,
  "efficacy" INTEGER /* Level of self-efficacy */,
  "efficacy_level_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the efficacies table */,
  "social_capital" REAL /* Level of social capital */,
  "social_capital_level_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the social capitals table */,
  "knowledge_on_warning" INTEGER /* Level of knowledge on tornado warnings */,
  "knowledge_on_tornado" INTEGER /* Level of knowledge on tornado safety */,
  "tornado_knowledge_level_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the tornado knowledge table */,
  "damage_experience" INTEGER /* Indicator if the individual has experienced tornado damage */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Indicator if the individual has children */,
  "trust_in_localESA" INTEGER /* Level of trust in local Emergency Services Agency */,
  "trust_in_fed" INTEGER /* Level of trust in federal agencies */,
  "republican" INTEGER /* Indicator if the individual is a republican */,
  "political_ideology" INTEGER /* Political ideology scale */,
  "white" INTEGER /* Indicator if the individual is white */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Income level */,
  "income_level_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the income levels table */,
  "risk_perception" INTEGER /* Level of risk perception */,
  "risk_perception_level_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the risk perceptions table */,
  "salience" INTEGER /* Level of salience */,
  "tornado_experience" INTEGER /* Indicator if the individual has tornado experience */,
  "output" INTEGER /* Output variable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resilience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_resilience_income FOREIGN KEY ("income") REFERENCES income_levels ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_resilience_knowledge_on_tornado FOREIGN KEY ("knowledge_on_tornado") REFERENCES tornado_knowledge ("knowledge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_resilience_risk_perception FOREIGN KEY ("risk_perception") REFERENCES risk_perceptions ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_resilience_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_resilience_social_capital FOREIGN KEY ("social_capital") REFERENCES social_capitals ("social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_resilience_efficacy FOREIGN KEY ("efficacy") REFERENCES efficacies ("efficacy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Description of the income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_perceptions" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk perception level */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Description of the risk perception level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tornado_knowledge" (
  "knowledge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each knowledge level */,
  "knowledge_level" TEXT /* Description of the knowledge level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("knowledge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_capitals" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social capital level */,
  "social_level" TEXT /* Description of the social capital level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "efficacies" (
  "efficacy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each self-efficacy level */,
  "efficacy_level" TEXT /* Description of the self-efficacy level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efficacy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "resilience_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community resilience record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resilience_id FOREIGN KEY ("resilience_id") REFERENCES community_resilience ("resilience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_services_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency services agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency services agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of the emergency services agency (e.g., local, federal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the agency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the agency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_information_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public information campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the public information campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of the public information campaign (e.g., tornado preparedness, disaster response) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign metric */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the public information campaigns table */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign metric (e.g., views, clicks, engagement) */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the campaign metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_metrics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES public_information_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency_campaigns" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the emergency services agencies table */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the public information campaigns table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the agency-campaign relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the agency-campaign relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id", "campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_agencies" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the emergency services agencies table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-agency relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-agency relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was submitted */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of data requested (e.g., community resilience, campaign metrics) */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data requests table */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the export was generated */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the export (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "export_status" TEXT /* Status of the export (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the export was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the export was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES data_requests ("request_id")
)
